title: angelica setchuenensis
intro: Angelica setchuenensis, also known as dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial properties. The health benefits of Angelica setchuenensis include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, making it a popular supplement in modern herbalism.
